fmiModelDescription.description: Model of data center that approximates the trim and respond logic

Item.name: HorizontalRadiation
Item.description: Use horizontal irradiation

Item.name: TemperaturesAndSkyCover
Item.description: Use dry-bulb and dew-point temperatures and sky cover

Item.name: NotProvided
Item.description: Not provided, computed from other efficiency terms

Item.name: Efficiency_VolumeFlowRate
Item.description: Array of efficiency vs. volumetric flow rate

Item.name: Power_VolumeFlowRate
Item.description: Array of power vs. volumetric flow rate

Item.name: EulerNumber
Item.description: One peak point to be used for the Euler number

Item.name: NotProvided
Item.description: Not provided, computed from other efficiency terms

Item.name: Efficiency_VolumeFlowRate
Item.description: Array of efficiency vs. volumetric flow rate

Item.name: Efficiency_MotorPartLoadRatio
Item.description: Rated input and array of efficiency vs. motor part load ratio yMot=WHyd/WMot_nominal

Item.name: GenericCurve
Item.description: Rated input and maximum efficiency to be used for generic curves

Item.name: OpPoint
Item.description: flow coefficient defined by m_flow_nominal/sqrt(dp_nominal)

Item.name: Kv
Item.description: Kv (metric) flow coefficient

Item.name: Cv
Item.description: Cv (US) flow coefficient

Item.name: Av
Item.description: Av (metric) flow coefficient

Item.name: ParallelFlow
Item.description: Parallel flow

Item.name: CounterFlow
Item.description: Counter flow

Item.name: CrossFlowUnmixed
Item.description: Cross flow, both streams unmixed

Item.name: CrossFlowStream1MixedStream2Unmixed
Item.description: Cross flow, stream 1 mixed, stream 2 unmixed

Item.name: CrossFlowStream1UnmixedStream2Mixed
Item.description: Cross flow, stream 1 unmixed, stream 2 mixed

Item.name: ConstantTemperaturePhaseChange
Item.description: Constant temperature phase change in one stream

Item.name: Constant
Item.description: Use parameter to set stage

Item.name: Stages
Item.description: Use integer input to select stage

Item.name: Continuous
Item.description: Use continuous, real input

Item.name: Parameter
Item.description: Use parameter value

Item.name: Input
Item.description: Use input signal

Item.name: NoInit
Item.description: No initialization (start values are used as guess values with fixed=false)

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: Steady state initialization (derivatives of states are zero)

Item.name: InitialState
Item.description: Initialization with initial states

Item.name: InitialOutput
Item.description: Initialization with initial outputs (and steady state of the states if possible)

Item.name: P
Item.description: P controller

Item.name: PI
Item.description: PI controller

Item.name: PD
Item.description: PD controller

Item.name: PID
Item.description: PID controller

Item.name: DynamicFreeInitial
Item.description: DynamicFreeInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: FixedInitial
Item.description: FixedInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial value fixed

Item.name: SteadyStateInitial
Item.description: SteadyStateInitial -- Dynamic balance, Steady state initial with guess value

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: SteadyState -- Steady state balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: Entering
Item.description: Fluid flow is only entering

Item.name: Leaving
Item.description: Fluid flow is only leaving

Item.name: Bidirectional
Item.description: No restrictions on fluid flow (flow reversal possible)

ScalarVariable.name: mAir_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate at fan

ScalarVariable.name: P_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal compressor power (at y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: tcduretset
ScalarVariable.description: CDU Return Set Temperature [C], NVIDIA GB200, Blackwell

ScalarVariable.name: dTEva_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature difference evaporator inlet-outlet

ScalarVariable.name: dTCon_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature difference condenser outlet-inlet

ScalarVariable.name: COPc_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Chiller COP

ScalarVariable.name: mCHW_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate at chilled water

ScalarVariable.name: mCW_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate at condenser water

ScalarVariable.name: dp_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal pressure difference

ScalarVariable.name: T_a1_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature at nominal conditions as port a1

ScalarVariable.name: T_b1_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature at nominal conditions as port b1

ScalarVariable.name: T_a2_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature at nominal conditions as port a2

ScalarVariable.name: T_b2_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature at nominal conditions as port b2

ScalarVariable.name: m1_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: m2_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: COC
ScalarVariable.description: Cycles of Concentration

ScalarVariable.name: Drift
ScalarVariable.description: Drift Loss [fraction of RR, e.g., 0.1% = 0.001]

ScalarVariable.name: Eva_Factor
ScalarVariable.description: Evaporation Factor

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.energyDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of energy balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.massDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of mass balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state, must be steady state if energyDynamics is steady state

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.substanceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.p_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of pressure

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.T_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.X_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.mSenFac
ScalarVariable.description: Factor for scaling the sensible thermal mass of the volume

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.port_a.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.port_b.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.port_b.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.pressure.V_flow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Volume flow rate at user-selected operating points

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.pressure.V_flow[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Volume flow rate at user-selected operating points

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.pressure.dp[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Fan or pump total pressure at these flow rates

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.pressure.dp[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Fan or pump total pressure at these flow rates

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.V_flow_max
ScalarVariable.description: Volume flow rate on the curve when pressure rise is zero

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.dpMax
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure rise on the curve when flow rate is zero

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.etaHydMet
ScalarVariable.description: Efficiency computation method for the hydraulic efficiency etaHyd

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.etaMotMet
ScalarVariable.description: Efficiency computation method for the motor efficiency etaMot

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.powerOrEfficiencyIsHydraulic
ScalarVariable.description: =true if hydraulic power or efficiency is provided, instead of total

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.efficiency.V_flow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Volumetric flow rate at user-selected operating points

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.efficiency.eta[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Fan or pump efficiency at these flow rates

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.motorEfficiency.V_flow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Volumetric flow rate at user-selected operating points

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.motorEfficiency.eta[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Fan or pump efficiency at these flow rates

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.motorEfficiency_yMot.y[1]

ScalarVariable.description: Fan or pump efficiency at these part load ratios

ScalarVariable.description: Volume flow rate at user-selected operating points

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.power.P[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Fan or pump electrical power at these flow rates

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.peak.V_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Volume flow rate at peak efficiency

ScalarVariable.description: Pressure rise at peak efficiency

ScalarVariable.description: Peak efficiency

ScalarVariable.description: Volume flow rate at peak efficiency

ScalarVariable.description: Pressure rise at peak efficiency

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.peak_internal.eta
ScalarVariable.description: Peak efficiency

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.haveWMot_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if the rated motor power is provided

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.speed_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal rotational speed for flow characteristic

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.constantSpeed
ScalarVariable.description: Normalized speed set point, used if inputType = Buildings.Fluid.Types.InputType.Constant

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.speeds[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector of normalized speed set points, used if inputType = Buildings.Fluid.Types.InputType.Stages

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.per.havePressureCurve
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if default record values are being used

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.inputType
ScalarVariable.description: Control input type

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.constInput
ScalarVariable.description: Constant input set point

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.stageInputs[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector of input set points corresponding to stages

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.computePowerUsingSimilarityLaws
ScalarVariable.description: = true, compute power exactly, using similarity laws. Otherwise approximate.

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.addPowerToMedium
ScalarVariable.description: Set to false to avoid any power (=heat and flow work) being added to medium (may give simpler equations)

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.nominalValuesDefineDefaultPressureCurve
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to avoid warning if m_flow_nominal and dp_nominal are used to construct the default pressure curve

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant of fluid volume for nominal flow, used if energy or mass balance is dynamic

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.use_riseTime
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to continuously change motor speed

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.riseTime
ScalarVariable.description: Time needed to change motor speed between zero and full speed

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.init
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (no init/steady state/initial state/initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.y_actual
ScalarVariable.description: Actual normalised fan or pump speed that is used for computations

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.P
ScalarVariable.description: Electrical power consumed

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.heatPort.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.heatPort.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.VMachine_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Volume flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.dpMachine
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.eta
ScalarVariable.description: Global efficiency

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.etaHyd
ScalarVariable.description: Hydraulic efficiency

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.etaMot
ScalarVariable.description: Motor efficiency

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.dp
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.vol.dynBal.U
ScalarVariable.description: Internal energy of fluid

ScalarVariable.name: der(pumCHW.vol.dynBal.U)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Internal energy of fluid)

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.dp_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value of pressure raise

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.dp_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal pressure raise, used to normalized the filter if use_riseTime=true,\n to set default values of constantHead and heads, and\n and for default pressure curve if not specified in record per

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.constantHead
ScalarVariable.description: Constant pump head, used when inputType=Constant

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.heads[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector of head set points, used when inputType=Stages

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.prescribeSystemPressure
ScalarVariable.description: =true, to control mover such that pressure difference is obtained across two remote points in system

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.dp_in
ScalarVariable.description: Prescribed pressure rise

ScalarVariable.name: pumCHW.dp_actual
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between the mover inlet and outlet

ScalarVariable.description: Type of energy balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: expVesCHW.traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.description: Start value of temperature

ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: expVesCHW.mSenFac
ScalarVariable.description: Factor for scaling the sensible thermal mass of the volume

ScalarVariable.name: expVesCHW.V_start
ScalarVariable.description: Volume of liquid stored in the vessel at the start of the simulation

ScalarVariable.name: pumCW.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant of fluid volume for nominal flow, used if energy or mass balance is dynamic

ScalarVariable.name: pumCW.use_riseTime
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to continuously change motor speed

ScalarVariable.description: Time needed to change motor speed between zero and full speed

ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (no init/steady state/initial state/initial output)

ScalarVariable.description: Electrical power consumed

ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: TCDUSup.m_flow_small

ScalarVariable.name: TCDUSup.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant at nominal flow rate (use tau=0 for steady-state sensor, but see user guide for potential problems)

ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of the passing fluid

ScalarVariable.description: Initial or guess value of output (= state)

ScalarVariable.name: TCDUSup.transferHeat
ScalarVariable.description: if true, temperature T converges towards TAmb when no flow

ScalarVariable.name: TCDUSup.TAmb
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed ambient temperature for heat transfer

ScalarVariable.name: TCDUSup.tauHeaTra
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant for heat transfer, default 20 minutes

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.port_a.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.port_b.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.port_b.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.dp
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.dp_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.m_flow_turbulent
ScalarVariable.description: Turbulent flow if |m_flow| >= m_flow_turbulent

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.CvData
ScalarVariable.description: Selection of flow coefficient

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.Kv
ScalarVariable.description: Kv (metric) flow coefficient [m3/h/(bar)^(1/2)]

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.Cv
ScalarVariable.description: Cv (US) flow coefficient [USG/min/(psi)^(1/2)]

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.Av
ScalarVariable.description: Av (metric) flow coefficient

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where linearization starts, if y=1

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.dpValve_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal pressure drop of fully open valve, used if CvData=Buildings.Fluid.Types.CvTypes.OpPoint

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.rhoStd
ScalarVariable.description: Inlet density for which valve coefficients are defined

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.use_strokeTime
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to continuously open and close valve using strokeTime

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.strokeTime
ScalarVariable.description: Time needed to fully open or close actuator

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.init
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (no init/steady state/initial state/initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.y_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial position of actuator

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.y
ScalarVariable.description: Actuator position (0: closed, 1: open)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.y_actual
ScalarVariable.description: Actual actuator position

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.actPos.y
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real output signal

ScalarVariable.name: der(tESLoop.val7.actPos.y)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Connector of Real output signal)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.dpFixed_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop of pipe and other resistances that are in series

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.l
ScalarVariable.description: Valve leakage, l=Kv(y=0)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Ratio actual to nominal mass flow rate of valve, phi=Kv(y)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.kFixed
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of fixed resistance that may be in series with valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.kVal
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val7.k
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve and pipe in series, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun1.res2.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal mass flow rate where transition to turbulent occurs

ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun1.res3.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun1.res3.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun1.res3.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun1.res3.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun1.res3.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.m_flow_nominal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate. Set negative at outflowing ports.

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.m_flow_nominal[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate. Set negative at outflowing ports.

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.m_flow_nominal[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate. Set negative at outflowing ports.

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.dp_nominal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate, set to zero or negative number at outflowing ports.

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.dp_nominal[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate, set to zero or negative number at outflowing ports.

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.dp_nominal[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate, set to zero or negative number at outflowing ports.

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal mass flow rate where transition to turbulent occurs

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.energyDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of energy balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.massDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of mass balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state, must be steady state if energyDynamics is steady state

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.substanceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.p_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of pressure

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.T_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.X_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.mSenFac
ScalarVariable.description: Factor for scaling the sensible thermal mass of the volume

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.prescribedHeatFlowRate
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if the model has a prescribed heat flow at its heatPort. If the heat flow rate at the heatPort is only based on temperature difference, then set to false

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.simplify_mWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to cause port_a.m_flow + port_b.m_flow = 0 even if mWat_flow is non-zero

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.nPorts
ScalarVariable.description: Number of ports

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal. Used only if model has two ports.

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[1].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[1].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[1].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[2].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[2].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[2].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[3].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[3].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.ports[3].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.U
ScalarVariable.description: Internal energy of the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.p
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.m
ScalarVariable.description: Mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.use_C_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to enable input connector for trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.heatPort.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.heatPort.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant at nominal flow

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.jun6.vol.dynBal.U
ScalarVariable.description: Internal energy of fluid

ScalarVariable.name: der(tESLoop.jun6.vol.dynBal.U)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Internal energy of fluid)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.port_a.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.port_b.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.port_b.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.dp
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.dp_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.m_flow_turbulent
ScalarVariable.description: Turbulent flow if |m_flow| >= m_flow_turbulent

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.CvData
ScalarVariable.description: Selection of flow coefficient

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.Kv
ScalarVariable.description: Kv (metric) flow coefficient [m3/h/(bar)^(1/2)]

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.Cv
ScalarVariable.description: Cv (US) flow coefficient [USG/min/(psi)^(1/2)]

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.Av
ScalarVariable.description: Av (metric) flow coefficient

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where linearization starts, if y=1

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.dpValve_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal pressure drop of fully open valve, used if CvData=Buildings.Fluid.Types.CvTypes.OpPoint

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.rhoStd
ScalarVariable.description: Inlet density for which valve coefficients are defined

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.use_strokeTime
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to continuously open and close valve using strokeTime

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.strokeTime
ScalarVariable.description: Time needed to fully open or close actuator

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.init
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (no init/steady state/initial state/initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.y_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial position of actuator

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.y
ScalarVariable.description: Actuator position (0: closed, 1: open)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.y_actual
ScalarVariable.description: Actual actuator position

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.actPos.y
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real output signal

ScalarVariable.name: der(tESLoop.val1.actPos.y)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Connector of Real output signal)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.dpFixed_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop of pipe and other resistances that are in series

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.l
ScalarVariable.description: Valve leakage, l=Kv(y=0)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Ratio actual to nominal mass flow rate of valve, phi=Kv(y)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.kFixed
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of fixed resistance that may be in series with valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.kVal
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: tESLoop.val1.k
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve and pipe in series, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.description: Air-side exponent for convective heat transfer coefficient, h~m_flow^n

ScalarVariable.description: Set to false to make air-side hA independent of mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: CDU.hA.waterSideTemperatureDependent
ScalarVariable.description: Set to false to make water-side hA independent of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: CDU.hA.airSideTemperatureDependent
ScalarVariable.description: Set to false to make air-side hA independent of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.port_a.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.port_b.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.port_b.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate, used for regularization near zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: For bi-directional flow, temperature is regularized in the region |m_flow| < m_flow_small (m_flow_small > 0 required)

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant at nominal flow rate (use tau=0 for steady-state sensor, but see user guide for potential problems)

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.initType
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (InitialState and InitialOutput are identical)

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of the passing fluid

ScalarVariable.name: der(TtesRet.T)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Temperature of the passing fluid)

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.T_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial or guess value of output (= state)

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.transferHeat
ScalarVariable.description: if true, temperature T converges towards TAmb when no flow

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.TAmb
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed ambient temperature for heat transfer

ScalarVariable.name: TtesRet.tauHeaTra
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant for heat transfer, default 20 minutes
